label: Revolve
description: 将 [r,z] profile 绕 Z 轴旋转为实体 shape；等价于 lathe。何时用：生成回转体（瓶/碗/灯罩/旋钮帽/喷嘴），不要用一摞圆柱去近似曲线轮廓。
description-en: Revolve an [r,z] profile around Z into a solid shape; alias of lathe. Use when: making bodies of revolution (bottle/bowl/shade/cap/nozzle) — do not approximate a curved profile with stacked cylinders.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（必须含 profile_id 所指 [r,z] profile）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; must contain the [r,z] profile referenced by profile_id.

inputs.name: profile_id
inputs.label: Profile id
inputs.description: 要旋转的 [r,z] profile id；从上游 Profile 节点的 id 输出连入
inputs.description-en: Id of the [r,z] profile to revolve. Feed from an upstream Profile node's `id` output.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 rev{n}

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description-en: Geometry after appending the revolved solid.

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行 shape 的 id（供下游引用）；引用失败时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the new shape (for downstream refs). Empty string when the ref failed.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: profile_id 缺失或找不到时的原因；非空表示未追加任何几何，批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取
outputs.description-en: Reason when profile_id is missing or not found. Non-empty means nothing was appended even though the batch may report ok — always read it.
